L1.description: Ghost replay puzzle. Move RIGHT 4x to trigger (retracts claw), RECORD (clone replays path holding trigger), then DOWN 7x through opened claw + RIGHT 5x to goal.
L1.strategy: Phase 1: 4x RIGHT to reach trigger at (37,7). Phase 2: RECORD creates clone that replays R,R,R,R. Phase 3: 7x DOWN (clone reaches trigger on move 4, claw retracts RIGHT before player passes through) + 5x RIGHT along bottom corridor to goal at (43,49).
